---
title: "Jinyuan Stella Sun, PhD"
image: "files/images/stellasun.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 50%
  <div class="contact-info">

  <div class="contact-heading">Email</div>

  <a href="mailto:jysun@utk.edu">jysun@utk.edu</a>

  <br><br>

  <div class="contact-heading">Office</div>

  Min H. Kao 604<br> 
  Department of EECS<br>
  University of Tennessee, Knoxville<br>
  1520 Middle Drive<br>
  Knoxville, TN 37996

  </div>
  #links:
   # - icon: sun
    #  text: Lab
     # href: https://www.github.com
      #target: _blank
    #- icon: globe
     # text: Uprofile
      #href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
      #target: _blank
    #- icon: envelope
     # text: E-mail
      #href: mailto:email@gmail.com    
    #- icon: linkedin
     # text: LinkedIn
      #href: https://linkedin.com
      #target: _blank
    #- icon: youtube
     # text: YouTube
      #href: https://www.youtube.com     
      #target: _blank 
    #- text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
     # href: https://orcid.org
      #target: _blank
    #- text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
     # href: https://www.webofscience.com  
      #target: _blank
    #- text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
     # href: https://www.scopus.com
      #target: _blank
    #- text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
     # href: https://scholar.google.com
      #target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

#listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
 # - id: recent-posts
  #  contents: 
   #   - posts
   #   - posts/post-links.yml
   # exclude:
   #   title: ""
   # type: grid
   # max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
 #   page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
  #  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
   # max-description-length: 75
   # sort: 
    #  - "date desc"
     # - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a Full Professor in the Min H. Kao Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville. My research lies at the intersection of cybersecurity, privacy, artificial intelligence, and cyber-physical systems. I develop methods to understand, evaluate, and improve the security, privacy, safety, and trustworthiness of intelligent systems that interact with the physical world.

My recent work focuses on AI security and privacy, including adversarial machine learning, privacy-preserving machine learning, trustworthy AI, model ownership and data provenance, and the security of AI-enabled cyber-physical and autonomous systems. I am particularly interested in understanding how machine learning models can be manipulated, attacked, or misused in real-world environments, and in developing principled defenses against security and privacy threats.

More broadly, my research aims to advance secure, privacy-preserving, and trustworthy intelligent systems for critical application domains, including energy, transportation, autonomous systems, smart infrastructure, and other safety-critical cyber-physical environments.

In my free time, I enjoy working out, singing, and traveling.
